title: NT's Minecraft PRO
description: A collection of Mods that change Minecraft, but keeps the vanilla feel.
body:
A collection of mods that upgrade every aspect of Minecraft, while keeping the vanilla feel.

For upgrading the UI we have Flow, Sounds and more.

For exploration the mods include Geophilic which enhance the biomes in the overworld.

If you enjoyed the modpack, you should check out my other cool projects.

- [https://modrinth.com/project/realisticworld](https://modrinth.com/project/realisticworld)
- [https://modrinth.com/modpack/better-optimizations](https://modrinth.com/modpack/better-optimizations)
